repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.ml-ai: PyTorch training loop, train/val/test split, overfitting and regularization, loss function and metrics, reproducible seeds, model checkpoint, and GPU memory limits
add a REST endpoint to a Flask service and write request validation

retrieval_query: pytorch training loop train validation test split overfitting regularization loss function metrics reproducibility seed checkpoint gpu memory data leakage

validation_smoke.name: code.ml-ai L3 validation smoke
signals: held-out test metric reported once and matches validation trend
training and validation loss curves both decreasing then validation plateauing
fixed-seed run reproduces the same metric
no preprocessing statistics fit on test data

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.ml-ai diagnosis smoke
signals: validation loss rising while training loss falls
preprocessing scaler fit before the split
metric computed on the same data used to tune
no seed set so runs are irreproducible
CUDA out-of-memory mid-epoch with no gradient accumulation
